inputs.label: Maternal Age
inputs.businessContext: Age of the pregnant woman at expected date of delivery.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age of the pregnant woman at expected date of delivery.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tahmini doğum tarihinde hamile kadının yaşı.

inputs.label: Systolic Blood Pressure
inputs.businessContext: Systolic blood pressure reading in early pregnancy.

businessContext_i18n.en: Systolic blood pressure reading in early pregnancy.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Erken gebelikte sistolik kan basıncı değeri.

inputs.label: Diastolic Blood Pressure
inputs.businessContext: Diastolic blood pressure reading in early pregnancy.

businessContext_i18n.en: Diastolic blood pressure reading in early pregnancy.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Erken gebelikte diyastolik kan basıncı değeri.

inputs.label: Previous Preeclampsia
inputs.businessContext: History of preeclampsia in a previous pregnancy (0 = No, 1 = Yes).

businessContext_i18n.en: History of preeclampsia in a previous pregnancy (0 = No, 1 = Yes).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Önceki gebelikte preeklampsi öyküsü (0 = Hayır, 1 = Evet).

inputs.label: Family History of Preeclampsia
inputs.businessContext: Mother or sister had preeclampsia (0 = No, 1 = Yes).

businessContext_i18n.en: Mother or sister had preeclampsia (0 = No, 1 = Yes).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Anne veya kız kardeşte preeklampsi (0 = Hayır, 1 = Evet).

formulas.linear_predictor: -10 + 0.03 * age + 0.05 * bmi + 0.02 * systolic_bp + 0.03 * diastolic_bp + 1.5 * previous_preeclampsia + 0.8 * family_history

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
